top.name: Restless March
top.rules_text: All friendly undead move 1 tile toward nearest enemy. If already adjacent they attack instead.

channel.name: Restless March (Channel)
channel.rules_text: Channel: Undead also gain +2 shield after moving/attacking

bottom.name: Bone Toss
bottom.rules_text: Deal 4 damage. Push target 1 tile. If pushed onto a corpse tile deal 2 bonus damage.
